## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's content creation services to Brooke, the new senior content marketing manager at you.com.](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end content creation, including daily publishing, CMS management, and analytics](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [Focus on audience-first approach, combining SEO and AI with human expertise for high-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [Primary output is blog posts (1500-2000 words), with potential for other content types like glossaries and guides](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [8-week Phase 1 for strategy and calibration, followed by Phase 2 for ongoing execution](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Overview

  - [Founded by Marcel, who built organic content engines at IBM, HashiCorp, and DeepGram](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [Combines AI workflows with human expertise for efficient, high-quality content creation](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [Solves problems of traditional agencies (limited execution) and AI-only solutions (quality issues)](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Focus on creating credible, comprehensive, and current content](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Ingest company, audience, and brand information to create context for AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [Use sophisticated AI for initial content generation](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
  - [Human experts review, edit, and ensure quality](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
  - [Emphasis on attribution and credible sources](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [Regular content refreshing included in partnership](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)

### Content Types and Capabilities

  - [Primary focus on blog posts (1500-2000 words)](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Can create glossaries, guides, and programmatic SEO content](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [Ability to produce infographics and cover images](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [Not currently set up for white paper creation, but open to exploration](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1317.0)

### Team Structure and Collaboration

  - [Phase 1: Erik (Account Strategist) and Ada (Editorial Account Strategist) lead strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
  - [Phase 2: Managing Director, Managing Editor, and additional team members](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
  - [Collaboration via Slack, Notion, and Airtable for content roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [Internal platform for execution, with plans to bring customers into the platform in the future](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)

### Engagement Structure

  - [Phase 1: 8 weeks for strategy development and calibration](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [Create artifacts by week 3-4, evolving throughout the engagement](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [Publish about 10 articles by the end of Phase 1](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [Phase 2: Daily execution based on established strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to send Brooke the contract and presentation deck for review](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
  - [Kickoff call scheduled for Tuesday at 4 pm Eastern](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Brooke to review materials and prepare questions for the kickoff call](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
  - [Team to discuss potential for creating longer-form content that could be adapted into white papers](https://fathom.video/share/zoGEjNVF_EVwmiPbSXM4a9W4Y3xxSPWG?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
